### MF-P1-04 — S00 intake incl. safety gate (spec: 07 S00, 10 §7, 01 §7)

- ☑ **MF-P1-04.07** -- Write manifest skeleton · SQLite row `ingested`

- ☑ **MF-P1-13.03** **[HARD BLOCKER]** -- Keep calibration/holdout anchors out of training, pseudo-label generation, model selection, threshold tuning, and certificate fitting as applicable · Verify: every forbidden reader path has a negative test · Blocked by: MF-P1-13.02 · HARD BLOCKER

A central disjoint reader-capability matrix authorizes train/model-selection/pseudo, calibration threshold/certificate fitting, and final holdout evaluation separately; protected_anchor_ids.txt prevents pseudo overlap. Cross-capability negative tests, launcher path checks, certificate partition checks, and the full repository suite passed 911/911.

    - Evidence: Focused 2026-07-14 governance/truth/autonomy/CVAT suite passed 92 tests; combined modernization evidence suite passed 164 tests. Runtime validation uses JSON Schema plus governance; active legacy versions, per-provider missing decisions, unresolved license activation, duplicate YAML keys, invalid lifecycle transitions, hard-bucket promotion regressions, and unsafe CVAT publication are rejected. Evidence: src/maskfactory/truth_tiers.py, src/maskfactory/autonomy/, tests/test_truth_tiers.py, tests/test_autonomy.py, and tests/test_dataset_builder.py.
